title: Uragoga delpinoana
taxonomy: Uragoga delpinoana is a species in the Rubiaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to Madagascar. The classification of Uragoga delpinoana places it in the genus Uragoga, which is part of the tribe Psychotrieae. Further classification includes its order and class as Gentianales and Magnoliopsida, respectively. Uragoga delpinoana's classification is closely related to other plants in the Rubiaceae family.
uses: Uragoga delpinoana is a species of plant that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. properties: Uragoga delpinoana has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever and inflammation.
